query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE companyId = 'B I IMOVEIS LTDA') as vendas_baggio,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commissions WHERE companyId = 'B I IMOVEIS LTDA') as comissoes_baggio,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE companyId = 'test_company') as vendas_testes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE companyId = 'B I IMOVEIS LTDA') as usuarios_baggio;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commissions WHERE companyId = 'B I IMOVEIS LTDA') as comissoes_baggio,

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE companyId = 'B I IMOVEIS LTDA') as usuarios_baggio;
